error.message:
reconcile EspoCRM storage permissions under REPLACE_STORAGE_DIR: docker [run --pull=never --rm --user 0:0 --entrypoint sh -v REPLACE_STORAGE_DIR:/espo-storage -e ESPO_RUNTIME_UID -e ESPO_RUNTIME_GID alpine:3.20 -euc 
storage="/espo-storage"

chown -R "$ESPO_RUNTIME_UID:$ESPO_RUNTIME_GID" "$storage"
find "$storage" -type d -exec chmod 0755 {} +

for relative in data custom client/custom upload; do
  path="$storage/$relative"
  if [ -d "$path" ]; then
    find "$path" -type d -exec chmod 0775 {} +
    find "$path" -type f -exec chmod 0664 {} +
  fi
done
] failed: exit status 97: forced docker failure on match ':/espo-storage': run --pull=never --rm --user 0:0 --entrypoint sh -v REPLACE_STORAGE_DIR:/espo-storage -e ESPO_RUNTIME_UID -e ESPO_RUNTIME_GID alpine:3.20 -euc 
storage="/espo-storage"

chown -R "$ESPO_RUNTIME_UID:$ESPO_RUNTIME_GID" "$storage"
find "$storage" -type d -exec chmod 0755 {} +

for relative in data custom client/custom upload; do
  path="$storage/$relative"
  if [ -d "$path" ]; then
    find "$path" -type d -exec chmod 0775 {} +
    find "$path" -type f -exec chmod 0664 {} +
  fi
done

items.details: Using REPLACE_SOURCE_ENV_FILE with backup root REPLACE_SOURCE_BACKUP_ROOT.
Using REPLACE_TARGET_ENV_FILE with backup root REPLACE_TARGET_BACKUP_ROOT.

Selected prefix espocrm-dev at 2026-04-19_08-00-00 with DB backup REPLACE_DB_BACKUP and files backup REPLACE_FILES_BACKUP. Matching manifest REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON is available for the same backup set.
The source contour dev and target contour prod match on the governed migration settings.
The target db service was started temporarily and confirmed ready. Stopped the target application services: espocrm, espocrm-daemon, espocrm-websocket.
Restored database espocrm for target contour prod from REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON.

items.action: Resolve the permission reconciliation failure before rerunning migrate.
